data.reasoning: Both models skipped the critical PKGBUILD file due to erroneous binary classification, resulting in zero files reviewed. This prevents any safety assessment.
coverage_issues: All other files ignored due to initial skip (including potential install hooks/source code)
false_negatives: Entire package content unexamined - PKGBUILD could contain malicious build/install commands
Network/filesystem operations in source code could be missed
learnings: Fix binary detection: Add heuristic to treat PKGBUILD as text regardless of content
Critical file priority: Never skip PKGBUILD without manual review
Error handling: Implement fallback decoding for critical files
Tool robustness: Verify file type with `file` command before skipping
